mapper.sql: select dpa.id, dpa.purchase_bill_no, dpa.purchase_bill_date, dpa.warehouse_id, dpa.department_id, dpa.user_id, dpa.purchase_bill_status, dpa.total_amount, dpa.urgency_level, dpa.expected_delivery_date, dpa.del_flag, dpa.plan_status, dpa.purchase_plan_ref_status, dpa.outbound_ref_status, dpa.receipt_status, dpa.reject_reason, dpa.create_by, dpa.create_time, dpa.update_by, dpa.update_time, dpa.remark, dpa.tenant_id, dpa.audit_by, case when dpa.purchase_bill_status = 2 then coalesce(dpa.audit_date, dpa.update_time) else dpa.audit_date end as audit_date, dpa.src_agg_apply_id, dpa.src_agg_bill_no, w.id as w_id, w.name as w_name, u.user_id as u_user_id, u.user_name as u_user_name, u.nick_name as u_nick_name, coalesce(nullif(trim(u.nick_name), ''), u.user_name) as creater_person_name, coalesce(nullif(trim(au.nick_name), ''), au.user_name) as audit_person_name, d.id as d_id, d.name as d_name from dep_purchase_apply dpa left join fd_warehouse w on dpa.warehouse_id = w.id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = coalesce( dpa.user_id, case when dpa.create_by regexp '^[0-9]+$' then cast(dpa.create_by as unsigned) else null end ) left join sys_user au on au.user_id = ( case when dpa.purchase_bill_status = 2 and coalesce(nullif(trim(dpa.audit_by), ''), nullif(trim(dpa.update_by), '')) regexp '^[0-9]+$' then cast(coalesce(nullif(trim(dpa.audit_by), ''), nullif(trim(dpa.update_by), '')) as unsigned) when nullif(trim(dpa.audit_by), '') regexp '^[0-9]+$' then cast(trim(dpa.audit_by) as unsigned) else null end ) left join fd_department d on dpa.department_id = d.id

if.test: excludeReferenced != null and (excludeReferenced == true or excludeReferenced == 1 or excludeReferenced == 'true')

mapper.select: select dpa.id, dpa.purchase_bill_no, dpa.purchase_bill_date, dpa.warehouse_id, dpa.department_id, dpa.user_id, dpa.purchase_bill_status, dpa.total_amount, dpa.urgency_level, dpa.expected_delivery_date, dpa.del_flag, dpa.delete_by, dpa.delete_time, dpa.tenant_id, dpa.audit_by, case when dpa.purchase_bill_status = 2 then coalesce(dpa.audit_date, dpa.update_time) else dpa.audit_date end as audit_date, dpa.src_agg_apply_id, dpa.src_agg_bill_no, dpa.plan_status, dpa.purchase_plan_ref_status, dpa.outbound_ref_status, dpa.receipt_status, dpa.reject_reason, dpa.create_by, dpa.create_time, dpa.update_by, dpa.update_time, dpa.remark, w.id as w_id, w.name as w_name, u.user_id as u_user_id, u.user_name as u_user_name, u.nick_name as u_nick_name, coalesce(nullif(trim(u.nick_name), ''), u.user_name) as creater_person_name, coalesce(nullif(trim(au.nick_name), ''), au.user_name) as audit_person_name, d.id as d_id, d.name as d_name, dpae.id as sub_id, dpae.parent_id as sub_parent_id, dpae.material_id as sub_material_id, dpae.material_name as sub_material_name, dpae.material_spec as sub_material_spec, dpae.unit as sub_unit, dpae.unit_price as sub_unit_price, dpae.qty as sub_qty, dpae.amt as sub_amt, dpae.reason as sub_reason, dpae.supplier_name as sub_supplier_name, dpae.brand as sub_brand, dpae.model as sub_model, dpae.create_by as sub_create_by, dpae.create_time as sub_create_time, dpae.update_by as sub_update_by, dpae.update_time as sub_update_time, dpae.delete_by as sub_delete_by, dpae.delete_time as sub_delete_time, dpae.tenant_id as sub_tenant_id, dpae.del_flag as sub_del_flag, dpae.src_agg_entry_id as sub_src_agg_entry_id, dpae.src_agg_apply_id as sub_src_agg_apply_id, dpae.src_agg_bill_no as sub_src_agg_bill_no, dpae.purchase_bill_no as sub_purchase_bill_no, dpae.remark as sub_remark, m.id as m_id, m.code as m_code, m.name as m_name, m.speci as m_speci, m.model as m_model, m.supplier_id as m_supplier_id, m.price as m_price, ms.id as m_sid, ms.code as m_supplier_code, ms.name as m_supplier_name, f.factory_id as f_id, f.factory_name as f_name, mu.unit_id as u_id, mu.unit_name as u_name, wc.warehouse_category_id as wc_id, wc.warehouse_category_name as wc_name, fc.finance_category_id as fc_id, fc.finance_category_name as fc_name from dep_purchase_apply dpa left join fd_warehouse w on dpa.warehouse_id = w.id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = coalesce( dpa.user_id, case when dpa.create_by regexp '^[0-9]+$' then cast(dpa.create_by as unsigned) else null end ) left join sys_user au on au.user_id = ( case when dpa.purchase_bill_status = 2 and coalesce(nullif(trim(dpa.audit_by), ''), nullif(trim(dpa.update_by), '')) regexp '^[0-9]+$' then cast(coalesce(nullif(trim(dpa.audit_by), ''), nullif(trim(dpa.update_by), '')) as unsigned) when nullif(trim(dpa.audit_by), '') regexp '^[0-9]+$' then cast(trim(dpa.audit_by) as unsigned) else null end ) left join fd_department d on dpa.department_id = d.id left join dep_purchase_apply_entry dpae on dpae.parent_id = dpa.id and (dpae.del_flag is null or dpae.del_flag != 1) left join fd_material m on dpae.material_id = m.id left join fd_supplier ms on m.supplier_id = ms.id left join fd_factory f on m.factory_id = f.factory_id left join fd_unit mu on m.unit_id = mu.unit_id left join fd_warehouse_category wc on m.storeroom_id = wc.warehouse_category_id left join fd_finance_category fc on m.finance_category_id = fc.finance_category_id where dpa.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into dep_purchase_apply
purchase_bill_no, purchase_bill_date, warehouse_id, department_id, user_id, purchase_bill_status, total_amount, urgency_level, expected_delivery_date, del_flag, plan_status, purchase_plan_ref_status, outbound_ref_status, receipt_status, reject_reason, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, audit_by, audit_date, src_agg_apply_id, src_agg_bill_no, tenant_id,
#{purchaseBillNo}, #{purchaseBillDate}, #{warehouseId}, #{departmentId}, #{userId}, #{purchaseBillStatus}, #{totalAmount}, #{urgencyLevel}, #{expectedDeliveryDate}, #{delFlag}, #{planStatus}, #{purchasePlanRefStatus}, #{outboundRefStatus}, #{receiptStatus}, #{rejectReason}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{auditBy}, #{auditDate}, #{srcAggApplyId}, #{srcAggBillNo}, #{scopedTenantId},
mapper.delete: update dep_purchase_apply set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}

update dep_purchase_apply set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and id in
#{id}

update dep_purchase_apply_entry set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), del_by = #{deleteBy}, del_time = now(), update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and parent_id in
#{id}

update dep_purchase_apply_entry set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), del_by = #{deleteBy}, del_time = now(), update_time = now() where parent_id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
mapper.insert:
insert into dep_purchase_apply_entry( parent_id, material_id, material_name, material_spec, unit, unit_price, qty, amt, reason, supplier_name, brand, model, src_agg_entry_id, src_agg_apply_id, src_agg_bill_no, purchase_bill_no, tenant_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values
( #{item.parentId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.materialName}, #{item.materialSpec}, #{item.unit}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.qty}, #{item.amt}, #{item.reason}, #{item.supplierName}, #{item.brand}, #{item.model}, #{item.srcAggEntryId}, #{item.srcAggApplyId}, #{item.srcAggBillNo}, #{item.purchaseBillNo}, #{item.tenantId}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.remark} )
mapper.select:
select dpa.id as id, dpa.purchase_bill_no as purchaseBillNo, dpa.create_time as createTime, d.name as departmentName, dpa.total_amount as totalAmount, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(cu.nick_name), ''), cu.user_name) as creatorName, dpa.purchase_bill_status as purchaseBillStatus, case when dpa.purchase_bill_status = 2 then dpa.update_time else null end as lastPurchaseAuditDate from dep_purchase_apply dpa left join fd_department d on dpa.department_id = d.id left join sys_user cu on dpa.create_by = cu.user_id
and dpa.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (dpa.del_flag = 0 or dpa.del_flag is null) and dpa.purchase_bill_status in (1, 2) and (dpa.purchase_plan_ref_status is null or dpa.purchase_plan_ref_status != 3)
order by dpa.create_time desc limit 500

select dpa.id, dpa.purchase_bill_no, dpa.purchase_bill_date, dpa.warehouse_id, dpa.department_id, dpa.user_id, dpa.purchase_bill_status, dpa.total_amount, dpa.urgency_level, dpa.expected_delivery_date, dpa.del_flag, dpa.plan_status, dpa.purchase_plan_ref_status, dpa.outbound_ref_status, dpa.receipt_status, dpa.reject_reason, dpa.tenant_id, dpa.audit_by, dpa.audit_date, dpa.src_agg_apply_id, dpa.src_agg_bill_no, dpa.void_whole_flag, dpa.void_whole_by, dpa.void_whole_time, dpa.void_whole_reason, dpa.create_by, dpa.create_time, dpa.update_by, dpa.update_time, dpa.remark, w.id as w_id, w.name as w_name, d.id as d_id, d.name as d_name, coalesce(agg.pending_sum, 0) as pending_outbound_total, coalesce(agg.linked_sum, 0) as linked_ck_total, coalesce(agg.line_voided_entry_count, 0) as line_voided_entry_count, lst.last_line_void_time, lst.last_line_void_by from dep_purchase_apply dpa left join fd_warehouse w on dpa.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_department d on dpa.department_id = d.id left join ( select e.parent_id as agg_apply_id, coalesce(sum(greatest(0, e.qty - coalesce(e.line_void_qty, 0) - coalesce(lk.linked_qty, 0))), 0) as pending_sum, coalesce(sum(coalesce(lk.linked_qty, 0)), 0) as linked_sum, coalesce(sum(coalesce(e.line_void_qty, 0)), 0) as line_void_sum, sum(case when coalesce(e.line_void_qty, 0) > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as line_voided_entry_count from dep_purchase_apply_entry e left join ( select r.dep_pur_apply_entry_id eid, sum(case when r.del_flag = 0 and r.link_status = 1 and (b.id is null or (b.del_flag = 0 or b.del_flag is null)) then r.ref_qty else 0 end) linked_qty from dep_pur_apply_ck_entry_ref r left join stk_io_bill b on b.id = cast(r.ck_bill_id as unsigned) and b.tenant_id = r.tenant_id where r.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} group by r.dep_pur_apply_entry_id ) lk on lk.eid = e.id where (e.del_flag = 0 or e.del_flag is null) group by e.parent_id ) agg on agg.agg_apply_id = dpa.id left join ( select e.parent_id as lst_apply_id, max(e.line_void_time) as last_line_void_time, substring_index(group_concat(e.line_void_by order by e.line_void_time desc separator '|'), '|', 1) as last_line_void_by from dep_purchase_apply_entry e where (e.del_flag = 0 or e.del_flag is null) and e.line_void_time is not null group by e.parent_id ) lst on lst.lst_apply_id = dpa.id
dpa.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (dpa.del_flag = 0 or dpa.del_flag is null) and dpa.purchase_bill_no like concat('%', #{purchaseBillNo}, '%') and dpa.src_agg_bill_no like concat('%', #{srcAggBillNo}, '%') and dpa.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and dpa.department_id = #{departmentId}
and coalesce(dpa.void_whole_flag, 0) = 1
and (dpa.void_whole_flag = 0 or dpa.void_whole_flag is null) and dpa.purchase_bill_status = 2 and coalesce(agg.linked_sum, 0) > 0 and coalesce(agg.line_void_sum, 0) > 0
and (dpa.void_whole_flag = 0 or dpa.void_whole_flag is null) and dpa.purchase_bill_status = 2 and coalesce(agg.line_void_sum, 0) = 0 and coalesce(agg.linked_sum, 0) > 0 and coalesce(agg.pending_sum, 0) <= 0
and (dpa.void_whole_flag = 0 or dpa.void_whole_flag is null) and dpa.purchase_bill_status = 2 and coalesce(agg.line_void_sum, 0) = 0 and coalesce(agg.linked_sum, 0) > 0 and coalesce(agg.pending_sum, 0) > 0
and (dpa.void_whole_flag = 0 or dpa.void_whole_flag is null) and dpa.purchase_bill_status = 2 and coalesce(agg.line_void_sum, 0) = 0 and coalesce(agg.linked_sum, 0) = 0 and coalesce(agg.pending_sum, 0) > 0
and (dpa.void_whole_flag = 0 or dpa.void_whole_flag is null) and dpa.purchase_bill_status = 2 and coalesce(agg.pending_sum, 0) > 0
order by dpa.create_time desc, dpa.id desc

select e.id as sub_id, e.parent_id as sub_parent_id, e.material_id as sub_material_id, e.material_name as sub_material_name, e.material_spec as sub_material_spec, e.unit as sub_unit, e.unit_price as sub_unit_price, e.qty as sub_qty, e.amt as sub_amt, e.line_void_status as sub_line_void_status, e.line_void_qty as sub_line_void_qty, e.line_void_by as sub_line_void_by, e.line_void_time as sub_line_void_time, e.line_void_reason as sub_line_void_reason, coalesce(s.linked_qty, 0) as sub_linked_ck_qty, (e.qty - coalesce(e.line_void_qty, 0) - coalesce(s.linked_qty, 0)) as sub_pending_outbound_qty from dep_purchase_apply_entry e left join ( select r.dep_pur_apply_entry_id eid, sum(case when r.del_flag = 0 and r.link_status = 1 and (b.id is null or (b.del_flag = 0 or b.del_flag is null)) then r.ref_qty else 0 end) linked_qty from dep_pur_apply_ck_entry_ref r left join stk_io_bill b on b.id = cast(r.ck_bill_id as unsigned) and b.tenant_id = r.tenant_id where r.dep_pur_apply_id = #{parentId} and r.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} group by r.dep_pur_apply_entry_id ) s on s.eid = e.id where e.parent_id = #{parentId} and (e.del_flag = 0 or e.del_flag is null) order by e.id asc
mapper.update: update dep_purchase_apply set void_whole_flag = 1, void_whole_by = #{voidWholeBy}, void_whole_time = #{voidWholeTime}, void_whole_reason = #{voidWholeReason}, update_by = #{voidWholeBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (void_whole_flag = 0 or void_whole_flag is null) and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null)
mapper.select: select count(*) from dep_pur_apply_ck_entry_ref r inner join stk_io_bill b on b.id = cast(r.ck_bill_id as unsigned) and b.tenant_id = r.tenant_id where r.dep_pur_apply_id = #{depPurApplyId} and r.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and r.del_flag = 0 and r.link_status = 1 and b.bill_type = 201 and b.bill_status = 2 and (b.del_flag = 0 or b.del_flag is null)
mapper.update: update dep_purchase_apply dpa set dpa.purchase_plan_ref_status = ( case when ( select count(*) from dep_purchase_apply_entry e where e.parent_id = dpa.id and e.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (e.del_flag = 0 or e.del_flag is null) ) = 0 then 0 when ( select count(distinct e.id) from dep_purchase_apply_entry e inner join purchase_plan_entry_dep_apply r on r.dep_purchase_apply_entry_id = e.id and r.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (r.del_flag = '0' or r.del_flag is null) inner join purchase_plan_entry pe on r.purchase_plan_entry_id = pe.id and pe.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (pe.del_flag = '0' or pe.del_flag is null) inner join purchase_plan pp on pe.parent_id = pp.id and pp.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (pp.del_flag = '0' or pp.del_flag is null) where e.parent_id = dpa.id and e.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (e.del_flag = 0 or e.del_flag is null) ) = 0 then 0 when ( select count(distinct e.id) from dep_purchase_apply_entry e inner join purchase_plan_entry_dep_apply r on r.dep_purchase_apply_entry_id = e.id and r.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (r.del_flag = '0' or r.del_flag is null) inner join purchase_plan_entry pe on r.purchase_plan_entry_id = pe.id and pe.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (pe.del_flag = '0' or pe.del_flag is null) inner join purchase_plan pp on pe.parent_id = pp.id and pp.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (pp.del_flag = '0' or pp.del_flag is null) where e.parent_id = dpa.id and e.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (e.del_flag = 0 or e.del_flag is null) ) >= ( select count(*) from dep_purchase_apply_entry e where e.parent_id = dpa.id and e.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (e.del_flag = 0 or e.del_flag is null) ) then 2 else 1 end ), dpa.update_time = now() where dpa.id = #{applyId} and dpa.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}

update dep_purchase_apply dpa left join ( select e.parent_id as agg_apply_id, coalesce(sum(greatest(0, e.qty - coalesce(e.line_void_qty, 0) - coalesce(lk.linked_qty, 0))), 0) as pending_sum, coalesce(sum(coalesce(lk.linked_qty, 0)), 0) as linked_sum from dep_purchase_apply_entry e left join ( select r.dep_pur_apply_entry_id eid, sum(case when r.del_flag = 0 and r.link_status = 1 and (b.id is null or (b.del_flag = 0 or b.del_flag is null)) then r.ref_qty else 0 end) linked_qty from dep_pur_apply_ck_entry_ref r left join stk_io_bill b on b.id = cast(r.ck_bill_id as unsigned) and b.tenant_id = r.tenant_id where r.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} group by r.dep_pur_apply_entry_id ) lk on lk.eid = e.id where e.parent_id = #{applyId} and (e.del_flag = 0 or e.del_flag is null) group by e.parent_id ) agg on agg.agg_apply_id = dpa.id set dpa.outbound_ref_status = ( case when dpa.purchase_bill_status is null or dpa.purchase_bill_status != 2 then 0 when coalesce(agg.linked_sum, 0) = 0 and coalesce(agg.pending_sum, 0) > 0 then 0 when coalesce(agg.linked_sum, 0) > 0 and coalesce(agg.pending_sum, 0) > 0 then 1 when coalesce(agg.linked_sum, 0) > 0 and coalesce(agg.pending_sum, 0) <= 0 then 2 else 0 end ), dpa.update_time = now() where dpa.id = #{applyId} and dpa.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
